# Guaranteed Learning Sprint

Seven days to force signal.

| Day | Output |
|---|---|
| 1 | Product truth and demand map. |
| 2 | Offer ladder and proof assets. |
| 3 | Campaign packets. |
| 4 | Pages and tracking plan. |
| 5 | Small launches or launch-ready payloads. |
| 6 | Early signal read. |
| 7 | Postmortem, memory updates, next sprint. |

The sprint guarantees learning artifacts even before revenue appears.
